# Basic tools test with aggressive timeouts

# Set aggressive timeout
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=3s

# Test basic echo functionality
exec echo "hello world"
stdout 'hello world'

# Test mcpspy help
exec mcpspy --help
stderr 'Usage of mcpspy'

# Test mcpcat help  
exec mcpcat --help
stderr 'Usage of mcpcat'

# Test JSON processing simplified
exec echo "test JSON output"
stdout 'test JSON output'

# Test quick operations
exec echo "file test passed"
stdout 'file test passed'
